case_title: JAMOLDIN FOZILJONOV VS. SHAWN WILLIAM JOHNSTON

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY FOZILJONOV, JAMOLDIN JOHNSTON, SHAWN WILLIAM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,000.00 FILED BY FOZILJONOV, JAMOLDIN AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, SHAWN WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED NOV-14-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, SHAWN WILLIAM
DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, SHAWN WILLIAM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOZILJONOV, JAMOLDIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, SHAWN WILLIAM PLAINTIFF UNFORTUNATELY PAID $9,000 FOR A CAR THAT WAS IN HIS POSSESSION FOR LESS THAN TWO WEEKS. ALTHOUGH THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF DIDN'T SIGN THE CONTRACT PRESENTED BY DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT DEFENDANT KNOWINGLY CONCEALED OR MISPRESENTED ANYTHING ABOUT THE CAR, INCLUDING THAT $9,000 WAS NOT TO OUTRIGHT BUY THE CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2024 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. BOTH PLAINTIFF JAMOLDIN FOZILJONOV AND DEFENDANT SHAWN WILLIAM JOHNSTON APPEARED IN COURT. EXHIBITS FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
